scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd backend typecheck
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:ci: bun run typecheck && bun run --cwd backend test:ci
scripts.contracts:deploy:testnet: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url fuji --broadcast --verify
scripts.contracts:deploy:mainnet: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url avalanche --broadcast --verify
